creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2008-09-24 07:26:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    benchmarks           Makefile 
  Added files:
    benchmarks/octave-forge-benchmark Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
  which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
  extensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
  build and install scripts.
  
  This is benchmark.
  
  The package contains code used to benchmark speed of Octave.
  
  WWW: http://octave.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             127301
  Submitted by:   Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen at math dot missouri dot edu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.65      +1 -0      ports/benchmarks/Makefile
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/benchmarks/octave-forge-benchmark/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/benchmarks/octave-forge-benchmark/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/benchmarks/octave-forge-benchmark/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/benchmarks/octave-forge-benchmark/pkg-plist (new)
